course.name: AI training for HR professionals
course.description: Integrate AI into your HR processes: recruitment, job posting writing, interviews and internal communications. Without sacrificing human judgement or compliance.

hero.title: AI as an ally
hero.description: Recruitment, job posting writing, interviews, internal communications — learn to integrate AI into your HR processes without sacrificing human judgement or compliance.

rows.label: Who it's for
rows.value: HR directors, recruitment managers, HR business partners

rows.label: Format
rows.value: Online or in person, from half a day

problemSolution.title: The HR challenges AI can solve
problemSolution.intro: HR teams are often overwhelmed by repetitive, low-value tasks. AI can structure and accelerate these processes, leaving more room for human judgement where it matters.

rows.problem: Sorting through hundreds of applications takes days and remains subjective despite the effort.
rows.solutionDesc: Build AI analysis grids to sort applications faster, more consistently and with better documentation.

rows.problem: Writing attractive and compliant job postings takes time, with uneven results.
rows.solutionDesc: Generate postings adapted to each role, at the right language level, with the right keywords to attract the right profiles.

rows.problem: Interviews are not always structured to allow fair and comparable evaluation.
rows.solutionTitle: Interview guides adapted to each role
rows.solutionDesc: Build behavioural interview guides and consistent evaluation criteria across recruiters.

items.title: AI and recruitment
items: Building CV analysis grids with AI
Writing targeted and compliant job postings
Managing unconscious bias with AI support

items.title: HR communications and documentation
items: Writing clear and effective internal communications
Producing HR policies and regulatory documents
Adapting communication style to different audiences

items.title: HR analytics and continuous improvement
items: Analysing HR data with accessible AI tools
Identifying trends in engagement and satisfaction
Building HR dashboards without technical skills

pricing.title: Tailored training for HR professionals
pricing.description: Our HR training adapts to your organisation, your sector and your specific challenges. Online or in person, in a group or in-house. Contact us to define the right solution.

faq.title: What HR professionals ask before signing up

items.question: Will AI replace HR decisions?
items.answer: No, and that is not the objective. The training teaches you to use AI to structure and accelerate repetitive tasks, while keeping human judgement at the centre of strategic decisions.

items.question: Does the training cover GDPR compliance?
items.answer: Yes. A module is dedicated to legal obligations relating to the processing of candidate and employee data. We cover best practices for staying compliant.

items.question: Which tools are covered?
items.answer: We cover versatile tools (ChatGPT, Claude) as well as recruitment-specific tools. The emphasis is on method, not on any particular tool.

items.question: Is the training suitable for small organisations?
items.answer: Absolutely. SMEs and start-ups often have small HR teams with a lot to do. The training is particularly relevant for maximising the impact of an HR team of 1 to 3 people.

ctaFinal.title: Join the HR professionals who recruit better and faster
ctaFinal.description: Individual training or for your HR department. Applicable from your next recruitment.
